item.title: The Lone Survivor Teen Witnesses Her Family’s Tragic End
item.description: An overview of the Cassidy Stay case, covering the tragic home invasion, the investigation that followed, and the survivor’s account of events.

item.title: Mom Missing 24 Years—Found Alive, Arrested
item.description: A missing woman is found alive after 24 years, leading to a major investigation and arrest. This overview covers the case and key developments as they unfolded.
